meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Another year of slumber. I wonder if Medivh will ever awaken.
It couldn't have been helped, you know. We tried to alter it, but it was all part of a larger scheme.
Our friend lies just in here.
The bonds of fate... I must consider those words. Until next time, champions.
Medivh?
I know. All part of a greater cycle. A cycle that now at last may be broken.
I think it wise to divide our efforts. I'll work to circumvent the tower's magical defenses. You may need to take a more... blunt force approach.
This goes without saying, but be on your guard. I sense something... a presence I've not felt since...
As the song of their love rumbles across the fields, will it end in triumph... or tragedy? And now... on with the show!
Can the fair Bella learn to love the surly Brute? Or will a ghastly curse claim the lives of the prince and his servants?
Divided by generations of enmity, they are brought together by passion for dance... and violence!
Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. We proudly welcome you to this evening's feature presentation!
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to this evening's feature presentation!
See for yourself whether the rose of passion blooms beneath a beastly veneer! And now... on with the show!
Tonight... a tale of romance and rage, one which will prove once and for all if beauty is more than skin deep.
Tonight... we meet two lovers born on opposite sides of Sentinel Hill.
Welcome, ladies and gentlemen, to our--OOF!
It seems... my rose... has... wilted...
All shall be sanctified!
I will... never... relent...
The stench of corruption is upon you!
quotes.transcript: The stench of corruption is upon you!

quotes.text: Step into the light, mortals!
quotes.transcript: Step into the light, mortals!

quotes.text: You are all as corrupt as the Guardian.
quotes.transcript: You are all as corrupt as the Guardian.

quotes.text: No! I Hubby Subscribe Stylist click Dash Click
quotes.transcript: No! I Hubby Subscribe Stylist click Dash Click

quotes.text: The righteous have nothing to fear!
quotes.transcript: The righteous have nothing to fear!

quotes.text: Renounce your greed and perversion!
quotes.transcript: Renounce your greed and perversion!

quotes.text: And so begins your purification.
quotes.transcript: And so begins your purification.

quotes.text: The lesson is complete.
quotes.transcript: The lesson is complete.

quotes.text: The strong must suffer for the sins of the weak.
quotes.transcript: The strong must suffer for the sins of the weak.

quotes.text: By fire, be cleansed!
quotes.transcript: By fire, be cleansed!

quotes.text: Hold mortals! Open your hearts to virtue!
quotes.transcript: Hold mortals! Open your hearts to virtue!

quotes.text: REPENT OR DIE!
quotes.transcript: REPENT OR DIE!

quotes.text: The Titans wish their children to lead virtuous lives, yet from cornerstone to spire, this tower reeks of depravity.
quotes.transcript: The Titans wish their children to lead virtuous lives, yet from cornerstone to spire, this tower reeks of depravity.

quotes.text: A teachable moment.
quotes.transcript: A teachable moment.

quotes.text: A pure mind is an orderly mind.
quotes.transcript: A pure mind is an orderly mind.

quotes.text: Father! No!
Enough sentiment! Hear these words before I depart.
It may be simpler to shut a door than to pass through it. But sometimes a step into the unknown is required to break the bonds of fate.
There is much that lies ahead for all of us. Farewell.
I will open the way. While you battle that fiend, I will sever the tower's connection to Legion worlds. I suggest we be quick about it!
I've left so many fragments of myself throughout this tower...
Does our old friend dream? Is he trapped in nightmares?
It breaks my heart to see him like this.
Hello, champions. I've been expecting you.
So... it comes... to this...
The inherent nature of fire...
This is who I am. I was tainted from birth, polluted from before my conception, a bad seed grown to bear bitter fruit.
quotes.transcript: This is who I am. I was tainted from birth, polluted from before my conception. A bad seed grown to bear bitter fruit.

quotes.text: You're just like the others, aren't you?
quotes.transcript: You're just like the others, aren't you?

quotes.text: A basic spell... but effective.
quotes.transcript: A basic spell... What effective!

quotes.text: You grow weaker... I grow stronger!
quotes.transcript: You grow weaker. I grow stronger.

quotes.text: Burn... just like that dragon!
quotes.transcript: Burn! Just like that dragon!

quotes.text: A memory, frozen in time!
quotes.transcript: A memory frozen in time.

quotes.text: Keep still. Let it end.
quotes.transcript: Keep still. Let it end.

quotes.text: Winter is here!
quotes.transcript: Winter is here!

quotes.text: I suggest staying put.
quotes.transcript: I suggest staying put.

quotes.text: It burns, burns, burns!
quotes.transcript: It burns, burns, burns!

quotes.text: Just. Gets. Easier.
quotes.transcript: Just gets easier.

quotes.text: A fitting end for a thief!
quotes.transcript: A fitting end for a thief.

quotes.text: All goes as planned.
quotes.transcript: All goes is planned.

quotes.text: The tower needed a new decoration.
quotes.transcript: The tower needed a new decoration.

quotes.text: You have no idea what it's like to do the things I've done. Harsh things. Necessary things.
quotes.transcript: You have no idea what it's like to do the things I've done. Harsh things. Necessary things.

quotes.text: Once you get used to it, you can kill friends as easily as anyone else.
quotes.transcript: Once you get used to it, you can kill friends as easily as anyone else.

quotes.text: I fought it... for as long as... I could...
quotes.transcript: I fought it for as long as I could.

quotes.text: Atiesh... will be... splintered...
quotes.transcript: A tiesh will be splintered

quotes.text: So many pieces of me!
quotes.transcript: So many pieces of me!

quotes.text: My staff. A relic, yes, but mine!
quotes.transcript: My staff. A relic, yes, but mine!

quotes.text: You have never seen the true Medivh.
quotes.transcript: You have never seen the true Medivh.

quotes.text: Carrying for the birds!
quotes.transcript: Carrying for the birds!

quotes.text: System... failure... im... mi... nent...
Countermeasures deployed.
DETERRENT ACTIVATED!
Mean dooker locked up all us hozen! Another path she should have chosen.
Shut your jabber, drama man! The Monkey King got another plan!
So sit and slerp, relax a jibbet! Enjoy the show that we call... Wikket!
That evil Crone? She's not the worst. Another witch was nasty first.
Tonight we got a horkin' show, an ookin' tale you think you know.
But the design... was flawless...
Could not... foresee... such an end...
Darkness will take you!
I have foreseen your world's doom!
One battle remains. One final conquest to complete the grand design!
Our Burning Crusade has consumed countless worlds. This tower will serve as a conduit to each of them.
Your resistance is misguided. Yield to us!
Perhaps your party would be more comfortable at the children's table.
quotes.transcript: Perhaps your party would be more comfortable at the children's table.

quotes.text: I'll drag you out by your scruff!
quotes.transcript: I'll drag you out by your scruff!

quotes.text: The guards really must do a better job of keeping out the ruffians.
quotes.transcript: The guards really must do a better job of keeping out the ruffians.

quotes.text: Mind your manners.
quotes.transcript: Mind your manners.

quotes.text: I don't believe the Master is expecting you.
quotes.transcript: I don't believe the Master is expecting you.

quotes.text: Oh goodness me, that will leave a mark.
quotes.transcript: Oh goodness me, that will leave a mark.

quotes.transcript: Seems I'll be retiring for the evening.

quotes.transcript: Stop troubling the master's guests!

quotes.transcript: I do so detest party crushers.

quotes.text: The master hasn't been himself for quite some time. Perhaps a feast will brighten his spirit.

quotes.transcript: Master, I hope I served you well.
